--[[ 
    GEMINI HUB V1: MASTER STEALTH (FORCE SHOW)
    - Fix: UI not appearing (Moved to PlayerGui)
    - Fix: Added On-Screen Toggle Button (No more Insert key needed)
    - Features: Speed 18, Smooth Fly, Safe Noclip, Fly-TP
]]

local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local pgui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local runService = game:GetService("RunService")
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")
local players = game:GetService("Players")

-- ลบของเก่าออกก่อนกันบั๊ก
if pgui:FindFirstChild("GeminiMaster_Final") then pgui.GeminiMaster_Final:Destroy() end

--// UI Setup
local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui", pgui)
ScreenGui.Name = "GeminiMaster_Final"
ScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false

-- ปุ่มเปิด/ปิด บนหน้าจอ (สำหรับคนไม่มีปุ่ม Insert)
local ToggleBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", ScreenGui)
ToggleBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 50, 0, 20)
ToggleBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0, 10)
ToggleBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(50, 50, 50)
ToggleBtn.Text = "OPEN/CLOSE"
ToggleBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
ToggleBtn.TextSize = 8

local Main = Instance.new("Frame", ScreenGui)
Main.Name = "MainFrame"
Main.Size = UDim2.new(0, 160, 0, 310)
Main.Position = UDim2.new(0.5, -80, 0.5, -155)
Main.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(15, 15, 15)
Main.Active = true
Main.Draggable = true
Main.Visible = true

local Title = Instance.new("TextLabel", Main)
Title.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 25)
Title.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(25, 25, 25)
Title.Text = " GEMINI MASTER V1"
Title.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
Title.TextSize = 10
Title.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold

-- ส่วนของปุ่มต่างๆ
local SpeedBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", Main)
local FlyBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", Main)
local NocBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", Main)
local TPFrame = Instance.new("ScrollingFrame", Main)
local UIList = Instance.new("UIListLayout", TPFrame)

local function styleBtn(btn, pos, text)
    btn.Size = UDim2.new(0.9, 0, 0, 25)
    btn.Position = pos
    btn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(35, 35, 35)
    btn.Text = text
    btn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    btn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
    btn.BorderSizePixel = 0
end

styleBtn(SpeedBtn, UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.1, 0), "Speed (18): OFF")
styleBtn(FlyBtn, UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.2, 0), "Fly: OFF")
styleBtn(NocBtn, UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.3, 0), "Noclip: OFF")

TPFrame.Size = UDim2.new(0.9, 0, 0, 175)
TPFrame.Position = UDim2.new(0.05, 0, 0.42, 0)
TPFrame.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(10, 10, 10)
TPFrame.BorderSizePixel = 0
UIList.SortOrder = Enum.SortOrder.LayoutOrder

--// Logic Variables
local speedOn, flyOn, noclipOn = false, false, false
local stealthSpeed = 18

--// Core Loop
runService.Stepped:Connect(function()
    if not player.Character or not player.Character:FindFirstChild("Humanoid") then return end
    local hum = player.Character.Humanoid
    local root = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart

    if speedOn and not flyOn then hum.WalkSpeed = stealthSpeed
    elseif not flyOn then hum.WalkSpeed = 16 end

    if flyOn then
        hum.PlatformStand = true
        root.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0.05, 0)
        local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame
        local move = hum.MoveDirection
        local newCF = root.CFrame
        if move.Magnitude > 0 then
            newCF = newCF + (cam.LookVector * (move.Z * -1) * 1.6) + (cam.RightVector * move.X * 1.6)
        end
        if uis:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then newCF = newCF * CFrame.new(0, 1.6, 0)
        elseif uis:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then newCF = newCF * CFrame.new(0, -1.6, 0) end
        root.CFrame = newCF
    end

    if noclipOn then
        for _, part in pairs(player.Character:GetDescendants()) do
            if part:IsA("BasePart") then part.CanCollide = false end
        end
    end
end)

--// Fly-TP Scanner
local function updateList()
    for _, v in pairs(TPFrame:GetChildren()) do if v:IsA("TextButton") then v:Destroy() end end
    for _, p in pairs(players:GetPlayers()) do
        if p ~= player then
            local pBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", TPFrame)
            pBtn.Size = UDim2.new(1, 0, 0, 25)
            pBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
            pBtn.Text = "FLY-TP: " .. p.DisplayName
            pBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(0.8, 0.8, 0.8)
            pBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSans
            pBtn.BorderSizePixel = 0
            pBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
                if p.Character and p.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then
                    local wasFly = flyOn
                    flyOn = true
                    player.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame = p.Character.HumanoidRootPart.CFrame * CFrame.new(0, 2, 5)
                    task.wait(0.15)
                    flyOn = wasFly
                    if not flyOn then player.Character.Humanoid.PlatformStand = false end
                end
            end)
        end
    end
    TPFrame.CanvasSize = UDim2.new(0, 0, 0, #players:GetPlayers() * 25)
end

--// Button Events
SpeedBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    speedOn = not speedOn
    SpeedBtn.Text = speedOn and "Speed: ON" or "Speed: OFF"
    SpeedBtn.TextColor3 = speedOn and Color3.new(0, 1, 0) or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end)

FlyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    flyOn = not flyOn
    FlyBtn.Text = flyOn and "Fly: ON" or "Fly: OFF"
    FlyBtn.TextColor3 = flyOn and Color3.new(0, 1, 0) or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
    if not flyOn and player.Character then player.Character.Humanoid.PlatformStand = false end
end)

NocBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    noclipOn = not noclipOn
    NocBtn.Text = noclipOn and "Noclip: ON" or "Noclip: OFF"
    NocBtn.TextColor3 = noclipOn and Color3.new(0, 1, 0) or Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
end)

ToggleBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    Main.Visible = not Main.Visible
end)

players.PlayerAdded:Connect(updateList)
players.PlayerRemoving:Connect(updateList)
updateList()
z0l918zn:
--// Gemini Fly Solo (Force Show Edition)
local player = game.Players.LocalPlayer
local pgui = player:WaitForChild("PlayerGui")
local runService = game:GetService("RunService")
local uis = game:GetService("UserInputService")

-- ลบ UI เก่าถ้ามี
if pgui:FindFirstChild("GeminiFlyUI") then pgui.GeminiFlyUI:Destroy() end

--// UI Setup (บังคับแสดงผลที่ PlayerGui)
local ScreenGui = Instance.new("ScreenGui", pgui)
ScreenGui.Name = "GeminiFlyUI"
ScreenGui.ResetOnSpawn = false

local FlyBtn = Instance.new("TextButton", ScreenGui)
FlyBtn.Size = UDim2.new(0, 100, 0, 40)
FlyBtn.Position = UDim2.new(0, 10, 0.5, -20) -- อยู่กลางจอด้านซ้าย
FlyBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
FlyBtn.Text = "FLY: OFF"
FlyBtn.TextColor3 = Color3.new(1, 1, 1)
FlyBtn.Font = Enum.Font.SourceSansBold
FlyBtn.TextSize = 18
FlyBtn.Active = true
FlyBtn.Draggable = true -- ลากปุ่มไปวางที่ไหนก็ได้

--// Logic Variables
local flyOn = false
local fly_speed = 1.6

--// Fly Logic
runService.Stepped:Connect(function()
    if not flyOn then return end
    if not player.Character or not player.Character:FindFirstChild("HumanoidRootPart") then return end
    
    local root = player.Character.HumanoidRootPart
    local hum = player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid")
    local move = hum.MoveDirection
    local cam = workspace.CurrentCamera.CFrame
    
    hum.PlatformStand = true
    root.Velocity = Vector3.new(0, 0.05, 0) -- ต้านแรงโน้มถ่วงแบบเนียนๆ
    
    local newCF = root.CFrame
    -- เคลื่อนที่ตามทิศทางการเดิน
    if move.Magnitude > 0 then
        newCF = newCF + (cam.LookVector * (move.Z * -1) * fly_speed) + (cam.RightVector * move.X * fly_speed)
    end
    
    -- กด Space บินขึ้น / กด LeftControl บินลง
    if uis:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.Space) then 
        newCF = newCF * CFrame.new(0, fly_speed, 0)
    elseif uis:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.LeftControl) then 
        newCF = newCF * CFrame.new(0, -fly_speed, 0) 
    end
    
    root.CFrame = newCF
end)

--// Button Event
FlyBtn.MouseButton1Click:Connect(function()
    flyOn = not flyOn
    if flyOn then
        FlyBtn.Text = "FLY: ON"
        FlyBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(0, 150, 0)
    else
        FlyBtn.Text = "FLY: OFF"
        FlyBtn.BackgroundColor3 = Color3.fromRGB(30, 30, 30)
        if player.Character and player.Character:FindFirstChildOfClass("Humanoid") then
            player.Character.Humanoid.PlatformStand = false
        end
    end
end)

-- แจ้งเตือนใน Console ว่ารันติดแล้ว
print("Gemini Fly Loaded - Check your screen for the button!")
